text: vayehi bimey achasheverovsh hu achasheverovsh hamolekh mehodu ve'ad-kush sheva' ve'eserim umea medina
bayamim hahem keshevet ׀ hamelekh achasheverovsh 'al kise malekhutov asher beshushan habira
bishenat shalovsh lemalekhov 'asa mishete lekhal-sarayv va'avadayv cheyl ׀ paras umaday haparetemim vesarey hamedinovt lefanayv
behareotov et-'osher kevovd malekhutov veet-yeqar tifeeret gedulatov yamim rabim shemovnim umeat yovm
uvimelovt ׀ hayamim haele 'asa hamelekh lekhal-ha'am hanimetseim beshushan habira lemigadovl ve'ad-qatan mishete shive'at yamim bachatsar ginat bitan hamelekh
chur ׀ karepas utekhelet achuz bechaveley-vuts vearegaman 'al-geliley khesef ve'amudey shesh mitovt ׀ zahav vakhesef 'al ritsefat bahat-vashesh vedar vesocharet
vehasheqovt bikheley zahav vekhelim mikelim shovnim veyeyn malekhut rav keyad hamelekh
vehashetiya khadat eyn ones ki-khen ׀ yisad hamelekh 'al kal-rav beytov la'asovt kiretsovn ish-vaish
gam vasheti hamaleka 'aseta mishete nashim beyt hamalekhut asher lamelekh achasheverovsh s
bayovm hashevi'i ketovv lev-hamelekh bayayin amar limehuman bizeta charevovna bigeta vaavageta zetar vekharekas shive'at hasarisim hamesharetim et-peney hamelekh achasheverovsh
lehavi et-vasheti hamaleka lifeney hamelekh bekheter malekhut lehareovt ha'amim vehasarim et-yafeyah ki-tovvat maree hi
vatemaen hamaleka vasheti lavov bidevar hamelekh asher beyad hasarisim vayiqetsof hamelekh meod vachamatov ba'ara vov
vayomer hamelekh lachakhamim yode'ey ha'itim ki-khen devar hamelekh lifeney kal-yode'ey dat vadin
vehaqarov elayv kareshena shetar ademata tareshish meres maresena memukhan shive'at sarey ׀ paras umaday roey peney hamelekh hayoshevim rishona bamalekhut
kedat mah-la'asovt bamaleka vasheti 'al ׀ asher lo-'aseta et-maamar hamelekh achasheverovsh beyad hasarisim s
vayomer mumekhan kh memukhan q lifeney hamelekh vehasarim lo 'al-hamelekh levadov 'aveta vasheti hamaleka ki 'al-kal-hasarim ve'al-kal-ha'amim asher bekhal-medinovt hamelekh achasheverovsh
ki-yetse devar-hamaleka 'al-kal-hanashim lehavezovt ba'eleyhen be'eyneyhen beameram hamelekh achasheverovsh amar lehavi et-vasheti hamaleka lefanayv velo-vaa
vehayovm haze tomarena ׀ sarovt paras-umaday asher shame'u et-devar hamaleka lekhol sarey hamelekh ukheday bizayovn vaqatsef

im-'al-hamelekh tovv yetse devar-malekhut milefanayv veyikatev bedatey faras-umaday velo ya'avovr asher lo-tavov vasheti lifeney hamelekh achasheverovsh umalekhutah yiten hamelekh lire'utah hatovva mimena
venishema' pitegam hamelekh asher-ya'ase bekhal-malekhutov ki raba hi vekhal-hanashim yitenu yeqar leva'eleyhen lemigadovl ve'ad-qatan
vayitav hadavar be'eyney hamelekh vehasarim vaya'as hamelekh kidevar memukhan
vayishelach sefarim el-kal-medinovt hamelekh el-medina umedina kikhetavah veel-'am va'am kileshovnov liheyovt kal-ish sorer beveytov umedaber kileshovn 'amov f
achar hadevarim haele keshokh chamat hamelekh achasheverovsh zakhar et-vasheti veet asher-'asata veet asher-nigezar 'aleyha
vayomeru na'arey-hamelekh mesharetayv yevaqeshu lamelekh ne'arovt betulovt tovvovt maree

veyafeqed hamelekh peqidim bekhal-medinovt malekhutov veyiqebetsu et-kal-na'arah-vetula tovvat maree el-shushan habira el-beyt hanashim el-yad hege seris hamelekh shomer hanashim venatovn tameruqeyhen
vehana'ara asher titav be'eyney hamelekh timelokh tachat vasheti vayitav hadavar be'eyney hamelekh vaya'as ken s
ish yehudi haya beshushan habira ushemov maredokhay ben yair ben-shime'i ben-qish ish yemini
asher hagela mirushalayim 'im-hagola asher hageleta 'im yekhaneya melekhe-yehuda asher hegela nevukhadenetsar melekh bavel
vayehi omen et-hadasa hi eseter bat-dodov ki eyn lah av vaem vehana'ara yefat-toar vetovvat maree uvemovt aviha veimah leqachah maredokhay lov levat
vayehi behishama' devar-hamelekh vedatov uvehiqavets ne'arovt rabovt el-shushan habira el-yad hegay vatilaqach eseter el-beyt hamelekh el-yad hegay shomer hanashim

vatitav hana'ara ve'eynayv vatisa chesed lefanayv vayevahel et-tameruqeyha veet-manovteha latet lah veet sheva' hane'arovt hareuyovt latet-lah mibeyt hamelekh vayeshaneha veet-na'arovteyha letovv beyt hanashim
lo-higida eseter et-'amah veet-movladetah ki maredokhay tsiva 'aleyha asher lo-tagid
uvekhal-yovm vayovm maredokhay mitehalekh lifeney chatsar beyt-hanashim lada'at et-shelovm eseter umah-ye'ase bah

uvehagi'a tor na'ara vena'ara lavov ׀ el-hamelekh achasheverovsh miqets heyovt lah kedat hanashim sheneym 'asar chodesh ki ken yimeleu yemey meruqeyhen shisha chodashim beshemen hamor veshisha chodashim babesamim uvetameruqey hanashim
uvaze hana'ara baa el-hamelekh et kal-asher tomar yinaten lah lavov 'imah mibeyt hanashim 'ad-beyt hamelekh
ba'erev ׀ hi vaa uvaboqer hi shava el-beyt hanashim sheni el-yad sha'ashegaz seris hamelekh shomer hapilageshim lo-tavov 'ovd el-hamelekh ki im-chafets bah hamelekh veniqerea veshem

uvehagi'a tor-eseter bat-avichayil dod maredokhay asher laqach-lov levat lavov el-hamelekh lo viqesha davar ki im et-asher yomar hegay seris-hamelekh shomer hanashim vatehi eseter noset chen be'eyney kal-roeyha
vatilaqach eseter el-hamelekh achasheverovsh el-beyt malekhutov bachodesh ha'asiri hu-chodesh tevet bishenat-sheva' lemalekhutov
vayeehav hamelekh et-eseter mikal-hanashim vatisa-chen vachesed lefanayv mikal-habetulot vayasem keter-malekhut beroshah vayamelikheha tachat vasheti
vaya'as hamelekh mishete gadovl lekhal-sarayv va'avadayv et mishete eseter vahanacha lamedinovt 'asa vayiten maseet keyad hamelekh
uvehiqavets betulovt shenit umaredokhay yoshev besha'ar-hamelekh
eyn eseter magedet movladetah veet-'amah kaasher tsiva 'aleyha maredokhay veet-maamar maredokhay eseter 'osa kaasher hayeta veamena itov s
bayamim hahem umaredokhay yoshev besha'ar-hamelekh qatsaf bigetan vateresh sheney-sarisey hamelekh mishomerey hasaf vayevaqeshu lishelocha yad bamelekh achasheverosh
vayivada' hadavar lemaredokhay vayaged leeseter hamaleka vatomer eseter lamelekh beshem maredokhay
vayevuqash hadavar vayimatse vayitalu sheneyhem 'al-'ets vayikatev besefer diverey hayamim lifeney hamelekh f
achar ׀ hadevarim haele gidal hamelekh achasheverovsh et-haman ben-hamedata haagagi vayenaseehu vayasem et-kiseov me'al kal-hasarim asher itov
vekhal-'avedey hamelekh asher-besha'ar hamelekh kore'im umishetachavim lehaman ki-khen tsivah-lov hamelekh umaredokhay lo yikhera' velo yishetachave
vayomeru 'avedey hamelekh asher-besha'ar hamelekh lemaredokhay madu'a ata 'ovver et mitsevat hamelekh
vayehi beameram kh keameram q elayv yovm vayovm velo shama' aleyhem vayagidu lehaman lireovt haya'amedu diverey maredokhay ki-higid lahem asher-hu yehudi
vayare haman ki-eyn maredokhay kore'a umishetachave lov vayimale haman chema
vayivez be'eynayv lisheloch yad bemaredokhay levadov ki-higidu lov et-'am maredokhay vayevaqesh haman lehashemid et-kal-hayehudim asher bekhal-malekhut achasheverovsh 'am maredokhay
bachodesh harishovn hu-chodesh nisan bishenat sheteym 'esere lamelekh achasheverovsh hipil pur hu hagovral lifeney haman miyovm ׀ leyovm umechodesh lechodesh sheneym-'asar hu-chodesh adar s

vayomer haman lamelekh achasheverovsh yeshenov 'am-echad mefuzar umeforad beyn ha'amim bekhol medinovt malekhutekha vedateyhem shonovt mikal-'am veet-datey hamelekh eynam 'osim velamelekh eyn-shove lehanicham
im-'al-hamelekh tovv yikatev leabedam va'aseret alafim kikar-kesef esheqovl 'al-yedey 'osey hamelakha lehavi el-ginezey hamelekh
vayasar hamelekh et-taba'etov me'al yadov vayitenah lehaman ben-hamedata haagagi tsorer hayehudim
vayomer hamelekh lehaman hakesef natun lakh veha'am la'asovt bov katovv be'eyneykha

vayiqareu soferey hamelekh bachodesh harishovn bishelovsha 'asar yovm bov vayikatev kekhal-asher-tsiva haman el achashedarepeney-hamelekh veel-hapachovt asher ׀ 'al-medina umedina veel-sarey 'am va'am medina umedina kikhetavah ve'am va'am kileshovnov beshem hamelekh achasheverosh nikhetav venechetam betaba'at hamelekh

venishelovcha sefarim beyad haratsim el-kal-medinovt hamelekh lehashemid laharog uleabed et-kal-hayehudim mina'ar ve'ad-zaqen taf venashim beyovm echad bishelovsha 'asar lechodesh sheneym-'asar hu-chodesh adar ushelalam lavovz
pateshegen haketav lehinaten dat bekhal-medina umedina galuy lekhal-ha'amim liheyovt 'atidim layovm haze
haratsim yatseu dechufim bidevar hamelekh vehadat nitena beshushan habira vehamelekh vehaman yashevu lishetovt veha'ir shushan navovkha f
umaredokhay yada' et-kal-asher na'asa vayiqera' maredokhay et-begadayv vayilebash saq vaefer vayetse betovkh ha'ir vayize'aq ze'aqa gedola umara
vayavov 'ad lifeney sha'ar-hamelekh ki eyn lavov el-sha'ar hamelekh bilevush saq
uvekhal-medina umedina meqovm asher devar-hamelekh vedatov magi'a evel gadovl layehudim vetsovm uvekhi umiseped saq vaefer yutsa' larabim
vatevoveyna kh vatavovna q na'arovt eseter vesariseyha vayagidu lah vatitechalechal hamaleka meod vatishelach begadim lehalebish et-maredokhay ulehasir saqov me'alayv velo qibel
vatiqera eseter lahatakh misarisey hamelekh asher he'emid lefaneyha vatetsavehu 'al-maredokhay lada'at mah-ze ve'al-mah-ze
vayetse hatakh el-maredokhay el-rechovv ha'ir asher lifeney sha'ar-hamelekh
vayaged-lov maredokhay et kal-asher qarahu veet ׀ parashat hakesef asher amar haman lisheqovl 'al-ginezey hamelekh bayehudiyim kh bayehudim q leabedam
veet-pateshegen ketav-hadat asher-nitan beshushan lehashemidam natan lov lehareovt et-eseter ulehagid lah uletsaovt 'aleyha lavov el-hamelekh lehitechanen-lov ulevaqesh milefanayv 'al-'amah
vayavov hatakh vayaged leeseter et diverey maredokhay
vatomer eseter lahatakh vatetsavehu el-maredokhay

kal-'avedey hamelekh ve'am-medinovt hamelekh yovde'im asher kal-ish veisha asher yavov-el-hamelekh el-hechatser hapenimit asher lo-yiqare achat datov lehamit levad measher yovshit-lov hamelekh et-sharevit hazahav vechaya vaani lo niqereti lavov el-hamelekh ze shelovshim yovm
vayagidu lemaredokhay et diverey eseter f
vayomer maredokhay lehashiv el-eseter al-tedami venafeshekh lehimalet beyt-hamelekh mikal-hayehudim
ki im-hacharesh tacharishi ba'et hazot revach vehatsala ya'amovd layehudim mimaqovm acher veat uveyt-avikh tovedu umi yovde'a im-le'et kazot higa'at lamalekhut
vatomer eseter lehashiv el-maredokhay

lekh kenovs et-kal-hayehudim hanimetseim beshushan vetsumu 'alay veal-tokhelu veal-tishetu sheloshet yamim layela vayovm gam-ani vena'arotay atsum ken uvekhen avov el-hamelekh asher lo-khadat vekhaasher avadeti avadeti
vaya'avor maredokhay vaya'as kekhol asher-tsiveta 'alayv eseter s
vayehi ׀ bayovm hashelishi vatilebash eseter malekhut vata'amod bachatsar beyt-hamelekh hapenimit nokhach beyt hamelekh vehamelekh yovshev 'al-kise malekhutov beveyt hamalekhut nokhach petach habayit
vayehi khireovt hamelekh et-eseter hamaleka 'omedet bechatser nasea chen be'eynayv vayovshet hamelekh leeseter et-sharevit hazahav asher beyadov vatiqerav eseter vatiga' berosh hasharevit s
vayomer lah hamelekh mah-lakh eseter hamaleka umah-baqashatekh 'ad-chatsi hamalekhut veyinaten lakh
vatomer eseter im-'al-hamelekh tovv yavov hamelekh vehaman hayovm el-hamishete asher-'asiti lov
vayomer hamelekh maharu et-haman la'asovt et-devar eseter vayavo hamelekh vehaman el-hamishete asher-'aseta eseter
vayomer hamelekh leeseter bemishete hayayin mah-sheelatekh veyinaten lakh umah-baqashatekh 'ad-chatsi hamalekhut vete'as
vata'an eseter vatomar sheelati uvaqashati
im-matsati chen be'eyney hamelekh veim-'al-hamelekh tovv latet et-sheelati vela'asovt et-baqashati yavov hamelekh vehaman el-hamishete asher e'ese lahem umachar e'ese kidevar hamelekh
vayetse haman bayovm hahu samecha vetovv lev vekhireovt haman et-maredokhay besha'ar hamelekh velo-qam velo-za' mimenu vayimale haman 'al-maredokhay chema
vayiteapaq haman vayavov el-beytov vayishelach vayave et-ohavayv veet-zeresh ishetov
vayesaper lahem haman et-kevovd 'asherov verov banayv veet kal-asher gidelov hamelekh veet asher niseov 'al-hasarim ve'avedey hamelekh
vayomer haman af lo-hevia eseter hamaleka 'im-hamelekh el-hamishete asher-'asata ki im-ovti vegam-lemachar ani qaru-lah 'im-hamelekh
vekhal-ze eynenu shove li bekhal-'et asher ani roe et-maredokhay hayehudi yovshev besha'ar hamelekh

vatomer lov zeresh ishetov vekhal-ohavayv ya'asu-'ets gavoha chamishim ama uvaboqer ׀ emor lamelekh veyitelu et-maredokhay 'alayv uvo-'im-hamelekh el-hamishete samecha vayitav hadavar lifeney haman vaya'as ha'ets f
balayela hahu nadeda shenat hamelekh vayomer lehavi et-sefer hazikheronovt diverey hayamim vayiheyu niqeraim lifeney hamelekh
vayimatse khatuv asher higid maredokhay 'al-bigetana vateresh sheney sarisey hamelekh mishomerey hasaf asher biqeshu lishelocha yad bamelekh achasheverovsh
vayomer hamelekh mah-na'asa yeqar ugedula lemaredokhay 'al-ze vayomeru na'arey hamelekh mesharetayv lo-na'asa 'imov davar
vayomer hamelekh mi vechatser vehaman ba lachatsar beyt-hamelekh hachitsovna lemor lamelekh litelovt et-maredokhay 'al-ha'ets asher-hekhin lov
vayomeru na'arey hamelekh elayv hine haman 'omed bechatser vayomer hamelekh yavov
vayavov haman vayomer lov hamelekh mah-la'asovt baish asher hamelekh chafets biqarov vayomer haman belibov lemi yachepots hamelekh la'asovt yeqar yovter mimeni
vayomer haman el-hamelekh ish asher hamelekh chafets biqarov
yaviu levush malekhut asher lavash-bov hamelekh vesus asher rakhav 'alayv hamelekh vaasher nitan keter malekhut beroshov

venatovn halevush vehasus 'al-yad-ish misarey hamelekh haparetemim vehilebishu et-haish asher hamelekh chafets biqarov vehirekivuhu 'al-hasus birechovv ha'ir veqareu lefanayv kakha ye'ase laish asher hamelekh chafets biqarov
vayomer hamelekh lehaman maher qach et-halevush veet-hasus kaasher dibareta va'aseh-khen lemaredokhay hayehudi hayovshev besha'ar hamelekh al-tapel davar mikol asher dibareta
vayiqach haman et-halevush veet-hasus vayalebesh et-maredokhay vayarekivehu birechovv ha'ir vayiqera lefanayv kakha ye'ase laish asher hamelekh chafets biqarov
vayashav maredokhay el-sha'ar hamelekh vehaman nidechaf el-beytov avel vachafuy rosh

vayesaper haman lezeresh ishetov ulekhal-ohavayv et kal-asher qarahu vayomeru lov chakhamayv vezeresh ishetov im mizera' hayehudim maredokhay asher hachilovta linepol lefanayv lo-tukhal lov ki-nafovl tipovl lefanayv
'ovdam medaberim 'imov vesarisey hamelekh higi'u vayavehilu lehavi et-haman el-hamishete asher-'aseta eseter
vayavo hamelekh vehaman lishetovt 'im-eseter hamaleka
vayomer hamelekh leeseter gam bayovm hasheni bemishete hayayin mah-sheelatekh eseter hamaleka vetinaten lakh umah-baqashatekh 'ad-chatsi hamalekhut vete'as
vata'an eseter hamaleka vatomar im-matsati chen be'eyneykha hamelekh veim-'al-hamelekh tovv tinaten-li nafeshi bisheelati ve'ami bevaqashati
ki nimekarenu ani ve'ami lehashemid laharovg uleabed veilu la'avadim velishefachovt nimekarenu hecherasheti ki eyn hatsar shove benezeq hamelekh s
vayomer hamelekh achasheverovsh vayomer leeseter hamaleka mi hu ze veey-ze hu asher-melaov libov la'asovt ken
vatomer-eseter ish tsar veovyev haman hara' haze vehaman nive'at milifeney hamelekh vehamaleka
vehamelekh qam bachamatov mimishete hayayin el-ginat habitan vehaman 'amad levaqesh 'al-nafeshov meeseter hamaleka ki raa ki-khaleta elayv hara'a meet hamelekh

vehamelekh shav miginat habitan el-beyt ׀ mishete hayayin vehaman nofel 'al-hamita asher eseter 'aleyha vayomer hamelekh hagam likhebovsh et-hamaleka 'imi babayit hadavar yatsa mipi hamelekh ufeney haman chafu s

vayomer charevovna echad min-hasarisim lifeney hamelekh gam hineh-ha'ets asher-'asa haman lemaredokhay asher diber-tovv 'al-hamelekh 'omed beveyt haman gavoha chamishim ama vayomer hamelekh teluhu 'alayv
vayitelu et-haman 'al-ha'ets asher-hekhin lemaredokhay vachamat hamelekh shakhakha f
bayovm hahu natan hamelekh achasheverovsh leeseter hamaleka et-beyt haman tsorer hayehudiyim kh hayehudim q umaredokhay ba lifeney hamelekh ki-higida eseter ma hu-lah
vayasar hamelekh et-taba'etov asher he'evir mehaman vayitenah lemaredokhay vatasem eseter et-maredokhay 'al-beyt haman f
vatovsef eseter vatedaber lifeney hamelekh vatipol lifeney ragelayv vatevek vatitechanen-lov leha'avir et-ra'at haman haagagi veet machashavetov asher chashav 'al-hayehudim
vayovshet hamelekh leeseter et sharevit hazahav vataqam eseter vata'amod lifeney hamelekh

vatomer im-'al-hamelekh tovv veim-matsati chen lefanayv vekhasher hadavar lifeney hamelekh vetovva ani be'eynayv yikatev lehashiv et-hasefarim machashevet haman ben-hamedata haagagi asher katav leabed et-hayehudim asher bekhal-medinovt hamelekh
ki eykhakha ukhal veraiti bara'a asher-yimetsa et-'ami veeykhakha ukhal veraiti beavedan movladeti s
vayomer hamelekh achasheverosh leeseter hamaleka ulemaredokhay hayehudi hine veyt-haman natati leeseter veotov talu 'al-ha'ets 'al asher-shalach yadov bayehudiyim kh bayehudim q
veatem kitevu 'al-hayehudim katovv be'eyneykhem beshem hamelekh vechitemu betaba'at hamelekh ki-khetav asher-nikhetav beshem-hamelekh venachetovm betaba'at hamelekh eyn lehashiv

vayiqareu soferey-hamelekh ba'et-hahi bachodesh hashelishi hu-chodesh sivan bishelovsha ve'eserim bov vayikatev kekhal-asher-tsiva maredokhay el-hayehudim veel haachashedarepenim-vehapachovt vesarey hamedinovt asher ׀ mehodu ve'ad-kush sheva' ve'eserim umea medina medina umedina kikhetavah ve'am va'am kileshonov veel-hayehudim kikhetavam vekhileshovnam
vayikhetov beshem hamelekh achasheverosh vayachetom betaba'at hamelekh vayishelach sefarim beyad haratsim basusim rokhevey harekhesh haachasheteranim beney haramakhim
asher natan hamelekh layehudim ׀ asher bekhal-'ir-va'ir lehiqahel vela'amod 'al-nafesham lehashemid velaharog uleabed et-kal-cheyl 'am umedina hatsarim otam taf venashim ushelalam lavovz
beyovm echad bekhal-medinovt hamelekh achasheverovsh bishelovsha 'asar lechodesh sheneym-'asar hu-chodesh adar
pateshegen haketav lehinaten dat bekhal-medina umedina galuy lekhal-ha'amim veliheyovt hayehudiyim kh hayehudim q 'atudim kh 'atidim q layovm haze lehinaqem meoyeveyhem
haratsim rokhevey harekhesh haachasheteranim yatseu mevohalim udechufim bidevar hamelekh vehadat nitena beshushan habira f
umaredokhay yatsa ׀ milifeney hamelekh bilevush malekhut tekhelet vachur va'ateret zahav gedovla vetakherikh buts vearegaman veha'ir shushan tsahala vesamecha
layehudim hayeta ovra vesimecha vesason viqar

uvekhal-medina umedina uvekhal-'ir va'ir meqovm asher devar-hamelekh vedatov magi'a simecha vesasovn layehudim mishete veyovm tovv verabim me'amey haarets miteyahadim ki-nafal pachad-hayehudim 'aleyhem

uvisheneym 'asar chodesh hu-chodesh adar bishelovsha 'asar yovm bov asher higi'a devar-hamelekh vedatov lehe'asovt bayovm asher siberu oyevey hayehudim lishelovt bahem venahafovkh hu asher yisheletu hayehudim hema besoneeyhem
niqehalu hayehudim be'areyhem bekhal-medinovt hamelekh ochasheverovsh lishelocha yad bimevaqeshey ra'atam veish lo-'amad lifeneyhem ki-nafal pachedam 'al-kal-ha'amim
